datasources.title: Data Sources
datasources.last_modified_t: Last edit of product page on {date} by
datasources.incomplete_or_incorrect: If the data is incomplete or incorrect, you can complete or correct it by editing this page.
datasources.check_be_first: Be the first to check this product

quality.sugars_gt_carbs: Sugar content cannot exceed total carbohydrates.
quality.energy_kcal_kj_mismatch: Energy values (kcal and kJ) do not match expected multipliers.
quality.fat_lt_saturated: Total fat cannot be less than saturated fat.
quality.salt_sodium_mismatch: Salt content and sodium do not mathematically align (Salt ≈ Sodium × 2.5).
quality.serving_size_missing_digits: Serving size must contain numbers (e.g. 10g or 1 slice).
quality.missing_serving_size: Nutrition facts per serving is enabled, but serving size is missing.
quality.quantity_not_recognized: Quantity string is not recognized by the parser.
quality.quantity_over_30kg: The quantity exceeds 30kg which is abnormally heavy.
quality.quantity_under_1g: The quantity is less than 1g which is abnormally light.
quality.serving_under_1g: Serving size is unusually small (less than 1g).
quality.serving_over_product_quantity: Serving size cannot be larger than the total product quantity.
quality.organic_but_no_label: The ingredients mention organic components, but the product lacks organic label tags.
quality.ingredients_too_many_digits: The ingredients text contains an unusually high number of digits (may indicate nutrition table text).
quality.ingredients_ending_comma: The ingredients list ends with an unnecessary comma.
quality.ingredients_consonants_mismatch: The ingredients list contains 5 or more consecutive consonants (may indicate spelling or OCR errors).
quality.ingredients_repeated_chars: The ingredients list contains 4 or more repeated characters.
quality.energy_kj_computed_mismatch: Energy kJ value does not match the sum computed from macronutrients.
quality.energy_kcal_computed_mismatch: Energy kcal value does not match the sum computed from macronutrients.
quality.energy_kj_computed_warning: Energy kJ value differs slightly from the sum computed from macronutrients.
quality.energy_kcal_computed_warning: Energy kcal value differs slightly from the sum computed from macronutrients.
quality.prepared_without_dried_category: Nutrition facts represent a prepared product, but the dried product category is missing.
quality.missing_prepared_with_dried_category: The dried product category is selected, but prepared nutrition facts are missing.
quality.nutriscore_grade_category_mismatch: The computed Nutri-Score grade does not match the expected grade for this category.
quality.serving_too_small_relative_to_product: Serving size is unusually small relative to the total product quantity (less than 1/1000th).
quality.serving_defined_but_quantity_undefined: Serving size is defined, but serving quantity could not be parsed.
quality.serving_size_in_mg: Serving size is in milligrams (normally should be in grams or milliliters).
quality.serving_quantity_not_recognized: Serving weight/volume is not recognized by the parser.
quality.quantity_over_10kg: The quantity exceeds 10kg which is heavy.
quality.quantity_in_mg: The quantity is in milligrams (normally should be in grams or kilograms).
quality.energy_kcal_gt_kj: Energy kcal value cannot be greater than energy kJ value.
quality.energy_kcal_kj_reversed: Energy kcal and kJ values appear to be reversed.
quality.energy_over_3911: Energy value is abnormally high (exceeds 3911 kJ/kcal per 100g).
quality.nutrition_total_over_105: The sum of major macronutrients (fat, carbs, proteins, salt) exceeds 105g.
quality.sugars_starch_fiber_gt_carbs: The sum of sugars, starch, and fiber exceeds total carbohydrates.
quality.salt_under_0_01g: Salt value is unusually small (under 0.01g). Check if it was entered in grams instead of milligrams.
quality.salt_under_0_001g: Salt value is extremely small (under 0.001g). Check if it was entered in grams instead of milligrams.
quality.alcoholic_beverages_without_alcohol: Product belongs to alcoholic beverages but is missing alcohol content.
quality.alcoholic_and_non_alcoholic_conflict: Conflict: Product categorized as both alcoholic and non-alcoholic.
quality.alcohol_without_alcoholic_category: Alcohol content is specified, but the product is not in an alcoholic beverages category.
quality.incompatible_plant_milk_dairy: Conflict: Product categorized as both plant milk and dairy.
quality.quantity_contains_e: The quantity string contains 'e' (consider using the standard estimation symbol '℮').
quality.identical_values_warning: Three or more nutrition values are identical, which is unusual.
quality.identical_values_error: All nutrition values are identical, which is likely a data entry error.
quality.vegan_label_non_vegan_ingredient: The product has a vegan label but contains non-vegan ingredients.
quality.low_energy_claim_conflict: Product claims to be low energy, but the energy value is above the limitation.
quality.low_fat_claim_conflict: Product claims to be low fat, but the fat value is above the limitation.
quality.no_fat_claim_conflict: Product claims to be fat-free, but fat is above 0.5g/100g.
quality.saturated_fat_free_claim_conflict: Product claims to be saturated fat-free, but saturated fat is above 0.1g/100g.
quality.low_sugar_claim_conflict: Product claims to be low sugar, but sugar is above the limitation.
quality.sugar_free_claim_conflict: Product claims to be sugar-free, but sugar is above the limitation.
quality.no_added_sugar_claim_conflict: Product claims to have no added sugar, but contains added sugar ingredients.
quality.high_fibers_claim_conflict: Product claims to be high fiber, but fiber is below the limitation.
quality.missing_specific_ingredient: The category suggests a specific ingredient should be present, but it is missing.

info.images: Upload clear images of the product, ingredients, and nutrition facts to help others identify the product.
info.basic_info: Provide the main details about the product, such as quantity, packaging, and manufacturer.
info.origin_traceability: Provide origin and traceability information, such as manufacturing places, origins of ingredients, and traceability codes.
info.languages: Add product names and descriptions in different languages to make the product accessible to more users.
info.ingredients: List all the ingredients present in the product. This helps users with allergies or dietary preferences.
info.nutrition: Enter nutritional values per 100g/ml as shown on the packaging. This helps users compare products.
info.moderator_tools: These tools are only available to moderators. They allow for administrative actions like correcting the product barcode.
info.prices: Help track this product's price history on Open Prices.
info.comment: Optionally, add a comment to describe your changes or provide additional context.
info.packaging: Describe each packaging component (bottle, cap, box, etc.) with its shape, material, and recycling instructions. You can add multiple components.

tooltips.serving_size: This value helps to make a proportional calculation of each nutrient per serving size. For example, 60 g, 60g or 60 G (prefer the first one), 1000 ml or 1L
tooltips.ingredients_list: Keep the original order. Indicate the percentage when specified. Separate with a comma or hyphen and use parentheses for ingredients of an ingredient.
tooltips.categories: Indicate only the most specific category. Parent categories will be automatically added. For example, 'Sardines in olive oil', 'Orange juice from concentrate'.
tooltips.product_name: The product name is the main name printed on the packaging. It can be a registered trademark. For example, 'Nesquik', 'Tomato Ketchup'. Don't include the brand in the name
tooltips.brand_name: Input all the brands of the product. The main brand, generally clearly displayed on the front pack, should be entered first. For example, 'Nutella, 'Oreo, Mondelez'
tooltips.quantity: Copy the value indicated on the product and don't forget the units. For example, 230g, 6(for 6 eggs), 3 x 150g (for a product with 3 boxes, each of 150g).
tooltips.labels: Any characteristic of the product **which is factual** and different from the other fields. For example, 'Nutri-Score, NOVA…', 'Made in Belgium, produced in Brittany…', 'ISO 9001, ISO 22000…'.
tooltips.stores: Input the store where you bought the product. For example, 'Carrefour', 'Walmart', 'Lidl'.
tooltips.origins: Add any indications of origins you can find on the packaging. You need not worry about origins indicated directly in the ingredient list. For example, 'Beef from Argentina', 'The soy does not come from the European Union'.
tooltips.traceability_code: In this section, you can input codes related to packaging marks, identification marks or health marks.
tooltips.countries: Countries where the product is widely available (not including stores specialising in foreign products).
tooltips.product_type: Select the type of product: Food, Beauty, Pet Food, or Other.
tooltips.empty_fiber: Enter a hyphen (-) if the value is not present on the packaging.
tooltips.allergens: List the allergens present in the product (e.g. Milk, Gluten, Eggs).
tooltips.traces: List any traces of allergens that may be present due to cross-contamination (e.g. Nuts, Soy).

edit.nutrition_issues_description: We have detected some potential issues with the nutritional information you provided. Please review the following warnings and make any necessary corrections before saving your changes.
edit.login_required_body: You must be logged in to contribute to the database. Sign in to add or edit food product information.
edit.dev_not_logged_in_body: This means that the product will not be saved to the database.
edit.dev_not_logged_in_hint: We allow opening this page because you're in development mode, but the submit button will not work.
edit.name: Name

packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_label: Quantity of product contained per unit
packaging_component.all_listed: All packaging components have been listed
packaging_component.number_of_units_desc: Enter the number of packaging units of the same shape and material contained in the product.
packaging_component.shape_desc: Enter the shape name listed in the recycling instructions if they are available, or select a shape.
packaging_component.material_desc: Enter the specific material if it can be determined (a material code inside a triangle can often be found on packaging parts), or a generic material (for instance plastic or metal) if you are unsure.
packaging_component.recycling_desc: Enter recycling instructions only if they are listed on the product.
packaging_component.weight_measured_desc: Remove any remaining food and wash and dry the packaging part before weighting. If possible, use a scale with 0.1g or 0.01g precision.
packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_desc: Enter the net weight or net volume and indicate the unit (for example g or ml).
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_desc: Write here the packaging information and/or the recycling instructions that are present on the product.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_list: List all packaging parts separated by a comma or line feed, with their amount (e.g. 1 or 6) type (e.g. bottle, box, can), material (e.g. plastic, metal, aluminium) and if available their size (e.g. 33cl) and recycling instructions.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_specificity: Try to be as specific as possible. For plastic, please indicate if it is opaque or transparent, colored, PET or PEHD.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_combination: Data from this field will be combined with any data provided for each packaging part. It is possible to provide one or the other, or both.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_examples: 1 plastic film to discard, 1 FSC carboard box to recycle, 6 1.5L transparent PET plastic bottles to recycle, 6 colored opaque plastic caps, 12 33cl aluminium cans
packaging_component.packaging_photo_desc: Photos of the packaging info and recycling instructions help to verify the data.
packaging_component.multiple_uploads_guidance: With Chrome, Firefox and Safari, you can select multiple pictures (product, ingredients, nutrition facts etc.) by clicking them while holding the Ctrl key pressed to add them all in one shot.

edit.origins: Origin of the product and/or its ingredients
edit.product_page_url_add: Link to the product page on the official site of the producer
edit.generic_name_placeholder: e.g., Chocolate chip cookies, Orange juice
